critique.summary: Function 'get_url_params' has 1 critical issue(s) (security) requiring immediate remediation before deployment.

wpcs_compliance.issue: Missing PHPDoc block for 'get_url_params' — required by WPCS for all public functions
wpcs_compliance.fix: Add /** @param, @return, @since tags above function 'get_url_params'

sql_safety.issue: No direct database queries in 'get_url_params' (source: facebook-for-woocommerce.json) — SQL safety dimension acceptable
sql_safety.fix: If database access is added later, always use $wpdb->prepare() with proper placeholders

security.issue: 'get_url_params' accesses $_POST/$_GET/$_REQUEST without nonce verification — CSRF attack allows unauthorized state changes via forged requests
security.fix: Add wp_verify_nonce($_POST['_wpnonce'], 'action_name') before processing any user input; use wp_nonce_field() in forms
